subject: upgrade efs/nfs options for aws timeout
commit_message:
upgrade efs/nfs options for aws timeout

Change-Id: I1d9729ffdb07504d74536ade922dbc3d9805e8b9
Issue-ID: LOG-1002
Signed-off-by: Michael O'Brien <michael@obrienlabs.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Recent changes to EFS in AWS
(-)     sudo mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2 $AWS_EFS.efs.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com:/ /$DOCKERDATA_NFS

(+)     sudo mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport $AWS_EFS.efs.$AWS_REGION.amazonaws.com:/ /$DOCKERDATA_NFS

{noformat}


testing
 sudo logging-analytics/deploy/aws/oom_cluster_host_install.sh -n true -s master.ons.zone -e fs-.3 -r us-east-2 -t 89459B,,,,...Gg -c true -v true

Patch Set 1:

lasted AWS EFS version requires this new flag or we get a mount timeout adding the NFS share
